title: Calylophus toumeyi

The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help alleviate symptoms of conditions such as arthritis and digestive issues. Bioactive constituents of Calylophus toumeyi include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids, which contribute to its medicinal properties.
